heading: Issuance of credit cards
label: 1642 Issuance of credit cards
text: No credit card shall be issued except in response to a request or application therefor. This prohibition does not apply to the issuance of a credit card in renewal of, or in substitution for, an accepted credit card.
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 91–508, title V, § 503(1)84 Stat. 1127Oct. 26, 1970“Section 132 of such Act [this section] takes effect on date of enactment of this title [].”Oct. 26, 1970
